role.invalid: Role must be one of the allowed values.

common.isString: This field must be a string.
common.isInt: This field must be an integer.
common.isNumber: This field must be a number.
common.isBoolean: This field must be a boolean.
common.isEnum: This field must be one of the allowed values.
common.isUrl: This field must be a valid URL.
common.notEmpty: This field must not be empty.
common.isArray: This field must be an array.
common.isObject: This field must be an object.
common.isId: This field must be a valid identifier.
common.isCurrency: This field must be a valid 3-letter currency code.
common.isPositive: This field must be a positive number.
common.min: This field is below the allowed minimum.
common.max: This field is above the allowed maximum.
common.slug: This field must be a lowercase slug (letters, numbers and hyphens).
